zh.Plumpton by Ecclesall, Yorkshire, Englan: 英國越可爾普倫普頓 白 艾可萊薩爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Simon Leeke於1328年出生在英國越可爾利阿可時，他的父親Sir John Leeke IV20歲，母親Joan de Grey Baroness Willoughby22歲。他和Margaret Vaux至少有6個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1382年在他的家鄉享年54歲。

zh-hans.Plumpton by Ecclesall, Yorkshire, Englan: 英国越可爾普倫普頓 白 艾可萊薩爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Simon Leeke于1328年出生在英国越可爾利阿可时，他的父亲Sir John Leeke IV20岁，母亲Joan de Grey Baroness Willoughby22岁。他和Margaret Vaux至少有6个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1382年在他的家乡享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: Leeke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Leake
meanings: habitational name from Leake (Lincolnshire), East and West Leake (Nottinghamshire), Leek (Staffordshire), Leck (Lancashire), Leak (NorthYorkshire), or Leak Hall in Cumberworth (West Yorkshire). The placenames derive from Old English lece or Old Scandinavian lœkr, both meaning ‘brook’. See also Like .
possibly also a nickname from Middle English lek ‘leek’ (Old English lēac), perhaps for a grower or seller of leeks.

nameMeanings.name: Simon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

variants.name: Simen
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Simon Leeke was born in 1328, in Leake, Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir John Leeke IV, was 20 and his mother, Joan de Grey Baroness Willoughby, was 22. He had at least 6 sons and 1 daughter with Margaret Vaux. He died in 1382, in his hometown, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Simon Leeke est né en 1328, à Leake, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Leeke IV, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Joan de Grey Baroness Willoughby, avait 22 ans. Il a eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille avec Margaret Vaux. Il est décédé en 1382, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Simon Leeke 1328 in Leake, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Leeke IV 20 und seine Mutter Joan de Grey Baroness Willoughby 22. Er hatte mit Margaret Vaux mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1382 im Alter von 54 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Simon Leeke è nato il nel 1328 nel Leake, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Sir John Leeke IV, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Joan de Grey Baroness Willoughby, aveva 22 anni. Lui avuto almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia con Margaret Vaux. Morì nel 1382, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.Cotham, Nottinghamshire, England: イギリスノッティンガムシュアイアコサム
ja.Plumpton by Ecclesall, Yorkshire, Englan: イギリスヨークシュアイアプルンプトン ビー エククレサル
ja.Leake, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアレアク
ja.lifeSummary: Simon Leekeが1328年にイギリスヨークシュアイアレアクで生まれた時，父Sir John Leeke IVは20歳，母Joan de Grey Baroness Willoughbyは22歳であった。彼はMargaret Vauxとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1382年に故郷で54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Simon Leeke(이)가 1328년 영국 요르크실르 리크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Leeke IV(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Grey Baroness Willoughby(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Margaret Vaux(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1382년 그의 고향에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Simon Leeke nasceu em 1328, em Leake, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Leeke IV, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Grey Baroness Willoughby, tinha 22 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha com Margaret Vaux. Ele faleceu em 1382, em sua cidade natal, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Simon Leeke родился в 1328 г. в местности лик, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Leeke IV было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Grey Baroness Willoughby, 22. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь от Margaret Vaux. Он умер в 1382 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 54 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Simon Leeke nació en 1328, en Leake, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Leeke IV, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Joan de Grey Baroness Willoughby, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija con Margaret Vaux. Murió en 1382, en su pueblo, a la edad de 54 años.
